name: Rose Hip Brightening Face Serum
description: A luxurious serum powered by cold-pressed rosehip oil and a potent 15% Vitamin C complex. Brightens dark spots, evens skin tone, and delivers a visible glow within 4 weeks.
ingredients: Rosehip Oil (Rosa Canina), Ascorbic Acid, Sodium Hyaluronate, Niacinamide, Jojoba Oil, Aloe Vera, Tocopherol, Glycerin, Aqua
howToUse: Apply 3-4 drops morning and evening after cleansing. Press gently into skin. Follow with moisturiser.

name: Green Tea Mattifying Moisturiser
description: Lightweight oil-free moisturiser packed with green tea antioxidants. Controls shine, minimises pores, and keeps skin balanced all day.
ingredients: Green Tea Extract, Niacinamide, Zinc PCA, Aloe Vera, Glycerin, Centella Asiatica, Aqua
howToUse: Apply a pea-sized amount on cleansed face morning and night. Use under sunscreen.

name: Calendula Soothing Toner
description: Alcohol-free toner with calendula and chamomile. Calms irritated skin, reduces redness, and preps skin for the rest of your routine.
ingredients: Rosa Damascena Water, Calendula Extract, Chamomile Extract, Glycerin, Panthenol, Aqua
howToUse: After cleansing, apply on cotton pad or spray directly. Pat gently, do not rinse.

name: Neem & Turmeric Purifying Cleanser
description: Gentle yet powerful cleanser with neem and turmeric. Deep-cleans pores, fights acne bacteria, and leaves skin bright and clear.
ingredients: Neem Extract, Turmeric Extract, Tea Tree Oil, Aloe Vera, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Aqua
howToUse: Wet face. Apply and massage 60 seconds. Rinse with lukewarm water. Use twice daily.

name: Multani Mitti Detox Face Mask
description: Classic Multani Mitti mask with kaolin clay and sandalwood. Draws out impurities, tightens pores, and leaves skin soft and matte.
ingredients: Fuller's Earth, Kaolin, Sandalwood Powder, Rose Water, Glycerin
howToUse: Mix with rose water to paste. Apply 15 minutes. Rinse with cool water. Use 2x per week.

name: Peptide Eye Revival Cream
description: Targeted eye cream with peptides and caffeine. Visibly reduces dark circles, depuffs, and firms the delicate under-eye area.
ingredients: Palmitoyl Tripeptide-1, Caffeine, Vitamin K, Niacinamide, Hyaluronic Acid, Shea Butter, Aqua
howToUse: Dab a tiny amount around eye area morning and night. Pat gently with ring finger.

name: Hyaluronic Acid Deep Hydration Serum
description: Lightweight water-based serum with three molecular weights of hyaluronic acid. Plumps fine lines and leaves skin dewy.
ingredients: Sodium Hyaluronate (3 weights), Aloe Vera, Panthenol, Glycerin, Centella Asiatica, Aqua
howToUse: Apply 3-4 drops to damp skin. Layer under moisturiser morning and night.

name: Retinol & Bakuchiol Night Cream
description: Powerful night cream combining retinol and plant-based bakuchiol. Reduces fine lines, boosts collagen, and reveals smoother skin overnight.
ingredients: Retinol, Bakuchiol, Squalane, Shea Butter, Peptide Complex, Niacinamide, Jojoba Oil, Aqua
howToUse: Apply pea-size at night after serum. Avoid eye area. Start 2-3x/week, increase gradually.

name: Vitamin C Glow Booster Essence
description: Watery essence with stable Vitamin C and kojic acid. Brightens dull skin, fades pigmentation, and gives an instant radiance boost.
ingredients: Ascorbyl Glucoside, Niacinamide, Kojic Acid, Glycerin, Centella Asiatica, Aqua
howToUse: After toning, pat a few drops onto skin. Follow with serum and moisturiser.

name: Oat & Honey Sensitive Skin Cream
description: Rich barrier-repairing cream with colloidal oatmeal and raw honey for sensitive and reactive skin. Fragrance-free and hypoallergenic.
ingredients: Colloidal Oatmeal, Honey, Allantoin, Ceramide NP, Shea Butter, Glycerin, Aqua
howToUse: Apply generously after toner and serum morning and night.

name: Bhringraj & Amla Hair Growth Oil
description: Ancient Ayurvedic hair oil with bhringraj, amla, and brahmi in sesame oil. Reduces hair fall, stimulates growth, and nourishes scalp.
ingredients: Sesame Oil, Bhringraj Extract, Amla Extract, Brahmi, Fenugreek Extract
howToUse: Warm oil. Massage into scalp 10-15 minutes. Leave 1-2 hours or overnight. Shampoo thoroughly.

name: Argan & Keratin Repair Shampoo
description: Sulfate-free shampoo with argan oil and keratin. Repairs damaged hair, reduces frizz, and restores shine after first wash.
ingredients: Argan Oil, Hydrolyzed Keratin, Biotin, Panthenol, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Aqua
howToUse: Lather on wet hair. Massage scalp. Rinse. Follow with conditioner.

name: Coconut Milk Deep Conditioner
description: Rich deep conditioner with coconut milk and shea butter. Transforms dry, brittle hair into soft, silky strands.
ingredients: Coconut Milk, Shea Butter, Argan Oil, Cetearyl Alcohol, Panthenol, Aqua
howToUse: After shampoo, apply mid-length to ends. Leave 3-5 minutes. Rinse with cool water.

name: Onion & Black Seed Anti-Hairfall Mask
description: Potent hair mask with onion extract and black seed oil. Strengthens roots, reduces hair fall, and promotes thicker hair.
ingredients: Onion Extract, Black Seed Oil, Castor Oil, Biotin, Keratin, Aqua
howToUse: Apply to scalp and hair. Massage well. Leave 30-60 minutes. Shampoo twice. Use weekly.

name: Hibiscus Scalp Serum
description: Targeted scalp serum with hibiscus and peppermint. Stimulates blood circulation, nourishes follicles, and promotes visible hair growth.
ingredients: Hibiscus Extract, Peppermint Oil, Biotin, Niacinamide, Salicylic Acid, Aqua
howToUse: Apply to scalp sections. Massage with fingertips. Do not rinse. Use daily.

name: Tea Tree Dandruff Control Shampoo
description: Powerful dandruff-fighting shampoo with tea tree oil and zinc pyrithione. Controls flakes, soothes itchy scalp.
ingredients: Tea Tree Oil, Zinc Pyrithione, Salicylic Acid, Aloe Vera, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Aqua
howToUse: Lather on wet scalp. Leave 2-3 minutes. Rinse. Use 3 times a week.

name: Fenugreek Protein Hair Pack
description: Protein-rich hair pack with fenugreek and egg protein. Strengthens weak hair, reduces breakage, adds body and volume.
ingredients: Fenugreek Seed Extract, Hydrolyzed Egg Protein, Almond Oil, Kaolin, Aqua
howToUse: Apply on clean damp hair. Leave 20 minutes. Rinse with cool water.

name: Aloe Vera Lightweight Hair Gel
description: Light-hold hair gel from pure aloe vera and flaxseed. Tames frizz, defines curls, adds shine without crunch.
ingredients: Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Flaxseed Extract, Glycerin, PVP (plant-derived), Aqua
howToUse: Apply to damp or dry hair. Scrunch into curls or smooth through. Air dry or diffuse.

name: Activated Charcoal Detox Face Bar
description: Deep-cleansing face bar with activated charcoal and kaolin clay. Draws out impurities, unclogs pores, leaves skin clean.
ingredients: Saponified Coconut Oil, Activated Charcoal, Kaolin, Tea Tree Oil, Glycerin
howToUse: Lather in hands. Apply to face gently. Massage 30 seconds. Rinse with lukewarm water.

name: Shea Butter & Lavender Body Bar
description: Creamy moisturising body bar handcrafted with shea butter and lavender. Cleanses gently, leaves skin baby-soft, provides aromatherapy relaxation.
ingredients: Saponified Shea Butter, Saponified Coconut Oil, Lavender Oil, Oat Milk, Glycerin
howToUse: Use on wet skin. Lather and massage. Rinse. Pat dry and moisturise.

name: Coffee & Walnut Body Scrub Bar
description: Invigorating body scrub bar with ground coffee and walnut shell. Buffs dead skin, improves circulation, leaves skin smooth and glowing.
ingredients: Saponified Coconut Oil, Coffee Grounds, Walnut Shell Powder, Coffee Essential Oil, Glycerin
howToUse: Use on wet skin in circular motions. Rinse. Use 2-3 times per week.

name: Neem & Turmeric Antibacterial Soap
description: Classic Ayurvedic soap with neem, turmeric, and sandalwood. Kills bacteria, fights body acne, prevents odour.
ingredients: Saponified Coconut Oil, Neem Extract, Turmeric, Sandalwood Powder, Glycerin
howToUse: Use daily on wet body. Lather, massage, rinse.

name: Rose & Geranium Luxury Bath Bar
description: Luxurious bath bar with rose absolute and geranium. Transforms bath time into a spa ritual and leaves a lingering floral fragrance.
ingredients: Saponified Sweet Almond Oil, Rose Absolute, Geranium Oil, Glycerin, Vitamin E
howToUse: Use daily in bath or shower. Lather generously. Rinse and enjoy lasting fragrance.

name: Charcoal Shampoo Bar
description: Zero-waste shampoo bar with activated charcoal. Deeply cleanses scalp, removes buildup. Replaces 2 plastic bottles.
ingredients: Saponified Coconut Oil, Activated Charcoal, Rosemary Oil, Peppermint Oil, Citric Acid
howToUse: Wet bar and hair. Rub on scalp or lather in hands. Massage. Rinse thoroughly.

name: Oatmeal & Honey Baby Soap
description: Ultra-gentle soap safe for babies and sensitive skin. Made with colloidal oatmeal and honey. Cleanses without irritation.
ingredients: Saponified Coconut Oil, Colloidal Oatmeal, Honey, Calendula Extract, Glycerin
howToUse: Lather gently with water. Apply to skin. Rinse well. Suitable from 0 months.

name: Peppermint & Eucalyptus Cooling Soap
description: Invigorating cooling soap with peppermint and eucalyptus. Refreshes body, fights odour, delivers tingling clean.
ingredients: Saponified Coconut Oil, Peppermint Oil, Eucalyptus Oil, Aloe Vera, Glycerin
howToUse: Use daily in shower. Great for summer mornings.

name: 100% Pure Lavender Essential Oil
description: Steam-distilled from Kashmiri lavender flowers. 100% pure essential oil promotes relaxation, aids sleep, soothes skin. GC/MS tested.
ingredients: 100% Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Essential Oil
howToUse: Diffuser: 3-5 drops. Topical: dilute 2% in carrier oil. Bath: 5-10 drops mixed with carrier.

name: Tea Tree Antiseptic Essential Oil
description: Pure Australian tea tree oil with powerful antibacterial and antifungal properties. Spot-treats acne and cleanses wounds.
ingredients: 100% Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree) Essential Oil
howToUse: Acne spot: dilute 1 drop in 9 drops carrier oil. Diffuser: 3-4 drops.

name: Cold-Pressed Rosehip Seed Oil
description: Cold-pressed from Chilean rosehip seeds. Naturally rich in Vitamin C, essential fatty acids, and retinoids that fade scars and brighten skin.
ingredients: 100% Rosa Canina (Rosehip) Seed Oil, Cold-Pressed
howToUse: Apply 3-5 drops to face and neck evening. Press gently into skin.

name: Moroccan Argan Oil Pure
description: Liquid gold from Morocco — 100% pure cold-pressed argan oil for face, hair, body, and nails. Rich in Vitamin E and oleic acid.
ingredients: 100% Argania Spinosa (Argan) Kernel Oil, Cold-Pressed
howToUse: Face: 2-3 drops, press into skin. Hair: few drops on ends. Body: mix with lotion.

name: Golden Jojoba Carrier Oil
description: Versatile carrier oil that mimics skin's natural sebum. Use as moisturiser, makeup remover, cuticle oil, or carrier for essential oils.
ingredients: 100% Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Cold-Pressed
howToUse: Use directly on skin, hair, or cuticles. Or dilute essential oils 2-3%.

name: Peppermint Essential Oil
description: Invigorating peppermint essential oil. Boosts energy, relieves headaches, clears sinuses, stimulates scalp.
ingredients: 100% Mentha Piperita (Peppermint) Essential Oil
howToUse: Diffuser: 3-4 drops. Headache: 1 drop diluted on temples. Scalp: 3 drops in shampoo.

name: Eucalyptus Essential Oil
description: Pure eucalyptus oil with high cineole content. Clears sinuses, fights colds, purifies air.
ingredients: 100% Eucalyptus Globulus Essential Oil
howToUse: Steam inhalation: 3-5 drops in hot water. Diffuser: 4-5 drops.

name: Tinted SPF Lip Balm — Rose
description: Moisturising tinted lip balm with SPF 15. Nourishes lips while adding a natural flush of colour. Made with shea butter and plant wax.
ingredients: Shea Butter, Candelilla Wax, Castor Oil, SPF 15 (Titanium Dioxide), Iron Oxides, Vitamin E
howToUse: Apply directly to lips anytime. Reapply throughout day.

name: Mineral BB Cream SPF 30
description: Lightweight BB cream with mineral SPF 30. Evens skin tone, blurs pores, hydrates while protecting from sun damage. No white cast.
ingredients: Zinc Oxide, Titanium Dioxide, Sodium Hyaluronate, Niacinamide, Aloe Vera, Iron Oxides, Aqua
howToUse: Apply after skincare. Blend with fingers or brush. Reapply every 2-3 hours in sun.

name: Kohl Kajal — Intense Black
description: Intensely pigmented kajal with almond oil and natural carbon black. Deep, smudge-proof lines. Safe for waterline use.
ingredients: Castor Oil, Almond Oil, Natural Carbon Black, Vitamin E, Candelilla Wax
howToUse: Line upper or lower lashline. Blend for smoky look. Safe for waterline.

name: Tinted Brow Gel — Brunette
description: Castor oil-enriched tinted brow gel that grooms, fills, and nourishes brows. Flexible hold, natural finish.
ingredients: Castor Oil, Vitamin E, Iron Oxides, Candelilla Wax, Aqua
howToUse: Brush brows in upward strokes. Build for more coverage. Dries in 30 seconds.

name: Lip & Cheek Tint — Peach Blush
description: Sheer buildable tint for lips and cheeks with beetroot extract and jojoba oil. Natural flush that lasts all day.
ingredients: Jojoba Oil, Castor Oil, Beet Root Extract, Vitamin E, Candelilla Wax, Iron Oxides
howToUse: Lips: apply with fingertip, blend edges. Cheeks: dot and blend with ring finger.

name: Rose Water Setting & Refreshing Mist
description: Pure steam-distilled rose water that sets makeup, refreshes skin mid-day, hydrates, and adds dewy glow.
ingredients: Rosa Damascena Flower Water (steam-distilled), Glycerin, Aloe Vera, Panthenol
howToUse: Spray 20cm from face, eyes closed. Use after makeup or anytime for glow boost.

name: Natural Mascara — Black
description: Clean buildable mascara with natural carbon black. Lengthens and defines lashes without clumping. Castor oil conditions lashes.
ingredients: Aqua, Natural Carbon Black, Castor Oil, Panthenol, Carnauba Wax, Candelilla Wax
howToUse: Wiggle wand at roots and sweep to tips. Build for more volume. Remove with micellar water.

name: Translucent Setting Powder
description: Finely-milled translucent setting powder from rice powder and tapioca starch. Sets makeup, controls shine, blurs pores.
ingredients: Rice Powder, Tapioca Starch, Mica, Silica, Boron Nitride
howToUse: Dust lightly over makeup or bare skin with fluffy brush.

name: Himalayan Pink Salt Bath Soak
description: Mineral-rich bath soak with Himalayan pink salt, Dead Sea salt, and lavender. Draws out toxins, soothes sore muscles, leaves skin soft.
ingredients: Himalayan Pink Salt, Dead Sea Salt, Lavender Oil, Epsom Salt, Rose Petals
howToUse: Add 2-4 tablespoons to warm bath. Soak 20-30 minutes. Pat dry.

name: Coffee & Coconut Body Scrub
description: Energising body scrub with ground coffee and coconut oil. Removes dead skin, reduces cellulite appearance, leaves skin radiant.
ingredients: Coffee Grounds, Coconut Oil, Brown Sugar, Coffee Essential Oil, Vitamin E
howToUse: Apply to damp skin in circular motions. Rinse. Use 2-3 times a week.

name: Rose Quartz Facial Roller
description: Dual-ended rose quartz facial roller. Promotes lymphatic drainage, reduces puffiness, boosts product absorption.
ingredients: 100% Natural Rose Quartz Crystal, Stainless Steel Handle
howToUse: Use on clean oiled skin. Roll outward and upward. Large end: cheeks/forehead. Small: eyes/nose. 5-10 mins daily.

name: Gua Sha Facial Sculpting Tool
description: Hand-carved jade gua sha that lifts, sculpts, and defines facial contours. Firms jaw, cheekbones, and neck.
ingredients: 100% Natural Nephrite Jade
howToUse: Apply face oil. Hold at 15°. Scrape outward with medium pressure. 5 minutes daily.

name: Aromatherapy Diffuser Blend — Calm
description: Synergistic blend of lavender, bergamot, and chamomile. Calms the nervous system, reduces anxiety, promotes restful sleep.
ingredients: Lavender Oil, Bergamot Oil, Chamomile Oil, Ylang Ylang Oil
howToUse: Diffuser: 4-5 drops. Pillow spray: dilute 10 drops in 100ml water. Bath: 8 drops in carrier.

name: Magnesium Epsom Salt Foot Soak
description: Therapeutic foot soak with pharmaceutical-grade Epsom salt, peppermint, and tea tree. Relieves tired feet, softens cracked heels.
ingredients: Epsom Salt, Peppermint Oil, Tea Tree Oil, Himalayan Salt
howToUse: Dissolve 2 tablespoons in warm water. Soak feet 20 minutes. Pat dry. Moisturise.

name: Dry Body Brush
description: Natural sisal dry body brush for pre-shower dry brushing. Exfoliates, stimulates lymphatic system, reduces cellulite.
ingredients: Natural Sisal Bristles, Sustainable Beechwood Handle
howToUse: Before shower on dry skin. Brush in long strokes toward heart. Start feet, work upward. Shower after.

name: Kumkumadi Tailam Face Oil
description: The legendary Kumkumadi Tailam with saffron, sandalwood, and 25 rare botanicals. Brightens complexion, fades blemishes, restores youthful radiance.
ingredients: Sesame Oil, Saffron, Sandalwood, Vetiver, Manjistha, + 21 rare Ayurvedic herbs
howToUse: Take 4-5 drops. Warm between palms. Press gently into cleansed face. Use nightly.

name: Multani & Haldi Ubtan Face Pack
description: Traditional Indian ubtan with Multani Mitti, turmeric, sandalwood, and rose petals. Brightens and gives the legendary pre-bridal glow.
ingredients: Fuller's Earth, Turmeric, Sandalwood Powder, Rose Petals, Chickpea Flour, Milk Powder
howToUse: Mix 2 tbsp with milk or rose water. Apply face and body. Leave 20 min. Scrub and rinse.

name: Neem Purifying Face Wash
description: Gentle Ayurvedic face wash with triple neem complex and tulsi. Clears acne, controls oil, prevents future breakouts.
ingredients: Neem Leaf Extract, Neem Bark, Neem Seed Oil, Tulsi, Glycerin, Aqua
howToUse: Wet face. Apply small amount. Lather gently. Rinse. Use twice daily.

name: Ashwagandha Stress Relief Body Oil
description: Ayurvedic body oil with ashwagandha and brahmi adaptogen extracts in sesame oil. Reduces cortisol, eases tension, deeply nourishes.
ingredients: Sesame Oil, Ashwagandha Extract, Brahmi, Bala, Lavender Oil
howToUse: Warm oil in palms. Massage into body. Leave on or rinse after 30 minutes.

name: Triphala Skin Detox Capsules
description: Organic Triphala capsules — the Ayurvedic superfood trinity for gut detox, improved digestion, and clearer, glowing skin from within.
ingredients: Amalaki, Bibhitaki, Haritaki — all USDA Organic
howToUse: Take 1-2 capsules before bedtime with warm water. Use 8-12 weeks.

name: Chandan & Rose Face Cream
description: Luxurious Ayurvedic face cream with pure sandalwood and Kashmiri rose. Brightens, hydrates, gives radiant even-toned glow.
ingredients: Sandalwood Extract, Rose Water, Saffron, Milk Protein, Shea Butter, Aqua
howToUse: Apply after serum morning and night. Massage in upward circular motions.

name: Bamboo Toothbrush Set of 4
description: Set of 4 biodegradable bamboo toothbrushes with BPA-free nylon bristles. Save 4 plastic handles from landfills every year.
ingredients: Moso Bamboo Handle, BPA-free Nylon Bristles
howToUse: Use twice daily. When bristles fray (2-3 months), remove bristles and compost handle.

name: Natural Crystal Deodorant Stick
description: Natural deodorant stick with potassium alum crystal, coconut oil, and shea butter. Controls odour 24 hours without blocking sweat glands.
ingredients: Potassium Alum (natural mineral), Coconut Oil, Shea Butter, Candelilla Wax, Lavender Oil
howToUse: Apply to clean dry underarms. One swipe per side. Allow to dry.

name: Reusable Organic Cotton Rounds — 20 Pack
description: 20 washable reusable organic cotton rounds. Replace 1500+ single-use cotton balls per year. Soft double-layer for gentle makeup removal.
ingredients: 100% USDA Organic Cotton (double-layer)
howToUse: Use like cotton pads. Wash in mesh bag after use. Machine wash up to 300 times.

name: Compostable Dental Floss
description: 100% compostable dental floss from corn-based PLA. Candelilla wax and peppermint oil. Refillable glass jar. Zero plastic waste.
ingredients: Corn-Based PLA Fibre, Candelilla Wax, Peppermint Oil
howToUse: Break off 45cm. Wind around fingers. Slide between teeth. Compost used floss.

name: Zero-Waste Shampoo + Conditioner Bar Set
description: Complete zero-waste hair care set — rosemary shampoo bar and argan conditioner bar. Together replace 4+ plastic bottles.
ingredients: Shampoo Bar: Saponified Oils, Rosemary Oil, Peppermint. Conditioner Bar: Shea Butter, Argan Oil.
howToUse: Shampoo Bar: lather on scalp, rinse. Conditioner Bar: rub on lengths, leave 2 min, rinse.

name: Natural Loofah Sponge — Pack of 3
description: Three 100% natural loofahs grown from the luffa plant. Exfoliates gently, improves circulation, fully compostable.
ingredients: 100% Natural Luffa Aegyptiaca (Loofah) Plant
howToUse: Soak in warm water to soften. Use with soap. Hang to dry. Replace after 4-6 weeks. Compost when done.
